ThingDef.label: Wolfein Tribal
ThingDef.description: A piece of Wolfein clothing made from various scraps of leather and fabric, designed for temporary coverage.

ThingDef.label: Wolfein Shirt(Trousers)
ThingDef.description: A simple shirt with trousers, widely used by Wolfein.

ThingDef.label: Wolfein Shirt(Skirt)
ThingDef.description: A simple shirt with skirt, widely used by Wolfein.

ThingDef.label: Wolfein Hoodie
ThingDef.description: Extra hood, extra warm. And make you dress like a hacker.

ThingDef.label: Wolfein T-shirt
ThingDef.description: Maybe a bit oversized, but it makes you stay cool.

ThingDef.label: Wolfein Crew Suit
ThingDef.description: Wolfein Crew Suits are made of special composite fabrics, which can effectively keep warm while maintaining convenience of movement.

ThingDef.label: Wolfein Slave Apron
ThingDef.description: Especially designed for Wolfein slaves. The collar will make them know who is the Boss.

ThingDef.label: Wolfein Short Overalls
ThingDef.description: Wolfein workers' best friend. The waist bags can store much more tools than it looks can.

ThingDef.label: Wolfein Reflective Vest
ThingDef.description: The Reflective Vest and the thickened jeans would keep you safe in the construction site.

ThingDef.label: Wolfein Chef Uniform
ThingDef.description: The Wolfein MegaCorp stipulates chefs in all legal restaurants within its jurisdiction must wear this uniforms.

ThingDef.label: Wolfein Labgown
ThingDef.description: Wolfein researchers' uniform, which would protect them from chemicals.

ThingDef.label: Wolfein Medical Gowns
ThingDef.description: A Surgical Gown with a white coat, may not so clean but quite useful.

ThingDef.label: Wolfein Tactical Jacket (Pants)
ThingDef.description: The jacket recently launched by The Wolfein MegaCorp has become the first choice for Wolfein outdoor travelers because of its best windproof and rainproof performance on the market.

ThingDef.label: Wolfein Tactical Jacket (Skirt)
ThingDef.description: The jacket recently launched by The Wolfein MegaCorp has become the first choice for Wolfein outdoor travelers because of its best windproof and rainproof performance on the market.

ThingDef.label: Wolfein Combat Bodysuit
ThingDef.description: A Wolfein Combat Bodysuit, thanks for Wolfein Composite Fabric, it could provide much higher protection level than it looks.

ThingDef.label: Wolfein Lightweight Combat Suit
ThingDef.description: A Wolfein Lightweight Combat Suit, designed to make Soldiers move faster. But it's protection level is lower compared with other Wolfein Army's combat suit.

ThingDef.label: Wolfein Rebel Uniform
ThingDef.description: Wolfein Rebel's Uniform, every new Wolfein Rebel member would wear them proudly, at first.

ThingDef.label: Wolfein Rebel Guerrilla Uniform
ThingDef.description: The Wolfein Rebel guerrilla uniform is issued to those volunteers who bravely resist outside the city, signifying that they are members of the Rebel, not bandits or marauders.

ThingDef.label: Wolfein Rebel Combat Suit
ThingDef.description: The Wolfein Rebel combat uniform, designed for close-quarters engagement with the enemies of the Rebel, whether they be made of steel or flesh.

ThingDef.label: Wolfein Rebel Support Suit
ThingDef.description: The Wolfein Rebel support suit, worn by those providing long-range support to their comrades, is designed solely for assistance on the frontlines, not for ease of retreat to the rear.

ThingDef.label: Wolfein Staff uniform
ThingDef.description: A neat uniform worn by Wolfein employees while working for the MegaCorp, often serving as a symbol of their status. It is frequently effective in intimidating civilians.

ThingDef.label: Wolfein Shirt Staff uniform
ThingDef.description: A common Wolfein staff uniform, but this one lacks the suit jacket.

ThingDef.label: Wolfein Longuette Staff uniform
ThingDef.description: A common Wolfein staff uniform, paired with a relatively long skirt.

ThingDef.label: Wolfein Sailor Suit
ThingDef.description: One of the common clothing styles in Wolfien schools, designed with a focus on convenience during sports, making it the top choice for sporty Wolfien girls.

ThingDef.label: Wolfein Sweater
ThingDef.description: A comfortable and warmly insulating everyday sweater, perfect for autumn and winter. Though it appears loose-fitting, it surprisingly accentuates the body's curves.

ThingDef.label: Wolfein Short T-shirt
ThingDef.description: Common summer attire for Wolfein girls, featuring a shorter and breezier crop top. Paired with denim shorts, it exudes both style and sexy.

ThingDef.label: Wolfein OL Suit
ThingDef.description: A professional Wolfein OL uniform, consisting of a simple shirt and a fitted skirt. Among civilians, this outfit has become a symbol of the company’s corporate image.

ThingDef.label: Wolfein BusinessUniform
ThingDef.description: A more breathable Wolfein staff uniform, paired with a shorter skirt, perfect for spring and summer wear.

ThingDef.label: Wolfein Cropped Jacket
ThingDef.description: A short jacket paired with hot pants, a summer favorite among Wolfein girls. However, for some unknown reason, a peculiar trend has emerged where they fasten only the collar and leave the zipper undone.

ThingDef.label: Wolfein Highcut Leotard
ThingDef.description: Made from specially crafted composite fabric, this form-fitting design incorporates embedded assistive devices that enhance the user’s speed and make shooting movements smoother.

ThingDef.label: Wolfein Regular Uniform
ThingDef.description: The standard military uniform of the Wolfein military corporation's mobile unit, meticulously crafted with rigorous techniques to ensure durability and functionality, making it ideal for extended combat and training.

ThingDef.label: Wolfein AIPT Uniform(Pants)
ThingDef.description: The uniform of the Wolfein AIPT signifies that its wearer will face hyperintelligent archotech mind creations and bear the responsibility of protecting MegaCorp assets from any harm.

ThingDef.label: Wolfein AIPT Uniform(Skirt)
ThingDef.description: The uniform of the Wolfein AIPT signifies that its wearer will face hyperintelligent archotech mind creations and bear the responsibility of protecting MegaCorp assets from any harm.

ThingDef.label: Wolfein AIPT Uniform(Trousers)
ThingDef.description: The uniform of the Wolfein AIPT signifies that its wearer will face hyperintelligent archotech mind creations and bear the responsibility of protecting MegaCorp assets from any harm.

ThingDef.label: Wolfein AIPT CombatSuit
ThingDef.description: The Wolfein AIPT combat uniform, designed for close-quarters handling of anomalies and their former owners, ensures the wearer can dominate in close combat situations.

ThingDef.label: Wolfein AIPT StandardUniform
ThingDef.description: The standard uniform for Wolfein AIPT Process Unit employees, emphasizing protection more than the Investigate Unit's attire, with an overall solemn style.

ThingDef.label: Wolfein AIPT SupportSuit
ThingDef.description: The Wolfein AIPT support suit, typically worn by remote fire support units of the Process Team, is designed for efficient processing anomaly and focuses on enhancing the wearer's shooting accuracy.
